summary: Continued gmClassic decompilation by renaming the Classic-mode function/data symbols from generic gm_* names to gmClassic_* names, updating the Classic MajorScene hooks and MinorScene references, adding a typed gm_803DDEC8Struct, implementing gmClassic_801B3E44, and matching a small gm_17C0 helper. Reviewer feedback specifically required keeping symbols.txt in sync so objdiff could see the renamed/decompiled function.
what_changed: Renamed Classic-mode text symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from gm_801B2BA4/gm_801B2D54/gm_801B2F78_OnLoad/gm_801B34B8_OnInit/etc. to gmClassic_801B2BA4, gmClassic_801B2D54, gmClassic_OnLoad, gmClassic_OnInit, gmClassic_801B3500 through gmClassic_801B3F18.

Renamed Classic-mode data/BSS/SBSS symbols in symbols.txt, including gm_803DDEC8 to gmClassic_803DDEC8, gm_80470708 to gmClassic_80470708, gm_80470850 to gmClassic_80470850, gm_8047086C to gmClassic_8047086C, gm_80472AF8 to gmClassic_80472AF8, gm_80490880 to gmClassic_80490880, and gm_804D68D0 to gmClassic_804D68D0.
Updated src/melee/gm/gmclassic.c so the Classic MinorScene table gm_803DDC58_MinorScenes references gmClassic_* callbacks and gmClassic_* scene data instead of generic gm_* symbols.

Implemented gmClassic_801B3E44(MinorScene* scene), including the pending_scene_change == 2 back-out path via gm_801A42F8(1), copying CSS selection data into gmMainLib_8015CDC8 state and gm_8017EB30 data, calling gmClassic_801B2D54(&gmClassic_803DDEC8), setting the next minor scene with gm_SetScenePendingMinor(temp_r29->x5 << 3), and calling gm_80168F88().

Renamed existing Classic callbacks in gmclassic.c and gmclassic.h, including gm_801B34B8_OnInit to gmClassic_OnInit, gm_801B3D44 to gmClassic_801B3D44, gm_801B3D84 to gmClassic_801B3D84, gm_801B3DD8 to gmClassic_801B3DD8, and gm_801B3F18 to gmClassic_801B3F18.
Changed the Classic MajorScene entry in gmscdata.c to use gmClassic_OnLoad and gmClassic_OnInit.
Updated Adventure and All-Star MinorScene tables to reference the newly named shared Classic data symbols gmClassic_80470708, gmClassic_80470850, gmClassic_8047086C, and gmClassic_80472AF8.

Added gm_803DDEC8Struct to src/melee/gm/types.h and included types.h from gmclassic.h so gmClassic_801B2D54 can take a gm_803DDEC8Struct* parameter and gmClassic_803DDEC8 can be declared with that type.
Matched fn_8017E21C in gm_17C0.c as a void function that loops over 12 lbl_804706D8 entries and sets x0 to -1; the header prototype was updated from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void fn_8017E21C(void).
Added Object(NonMatching, "MSL/math_data.c") to configure.py. The PR slice does not explain why this build-config addition was needed.
smart_moves: The rename was applied consistently across symbols.txt, headers, C definitions, scene tables, and extern declarations, which reduces ambiguous generic gm_* ownership for Classic-mode code.
The PR did not only rename the decompiled function in C; it also updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt so tooling such as objdiff can associate the address with the new gmClassic_* symbol.

Introducing gm_803DDEC8Struct allowed gmClassic_801B2D54 and gmClassic_803DDEC8 to move away from untyped/byte data toward a reusable typed declaration, while preserving unknown fields as bitfields and padding where names were not yet known.
The small fn_8017E21C match used the apparent fixed array count of 12 and a minimal two-s16 struct for lbl_804706D8, avoiding over-naming or over-structuring unknown data.
Adventure and All-Star files were updated to follow the shared data rename, preventing stale extern declarations from masking ownership of the Classic shared scene data.
decomp_lessons: When renaming a decompiled function from an address-style gm_* placeholder to a subsystem prefix, update symbols.txt in the same PR or objdiff may not track the function under the new name.

Scene-table decompilation often requires coordinated changes across the owning mode file and other modes that reuse the same scene data objects; search for all externs and address-symbol references before finishing a rename.
Prefer subsystem prefixes such as gmClassic_ for functions and global data once ownership is known, while retaining address suffixes for functions whose semantic names are not yet established.
A function prototype improvement should be propagated to the header immediately, as with fn_8017E21C changing to void fn_8017E21C(void).
Typed structures can be introduced incrementally with anonymous/padded fields and bitfields when exact semantics are unknown, as long as they support matching and avoid invented names.
Reviewer feedback shows that symbol-map maintenance is considered part of decomp completion, not a separate cleanup step.
naming_conventions: Classic-mode functions use the gmClassic_ prefix, e.g. gmClassic_OnLoad, gmClassic_OnInit, gmClassic_801B3E44.
Known lifecycle callbacks use semantic suffixes OnLoad and OnInit instead of raw address-only names when their role is clear.
Classic-mode global data was renamed from generic gm_804xxxxx names to gmClassic_804xxxxx names while retaining address suffixes where semantics remain unknown.
The new data type name gm_803DDEC8Struct follows the address-derived struct naming style for data whose semantic purpose is not yet known.
Unresolved function bodies remain as decomp markers using the renamed symbol, e.g. /// #gmClassic_801B2BA4, rather than the old gm_* marker.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Implemented gmClassic_801B3E44 with a direct early return on CSS pending_scene_change == 2 before copying selection fields, matching a control-flow distinction for backing out of the CSS.
Used explicit field-by-field copies from gmMainLib_8015CDC8 state into gm_8017EB30()->x0 fields for ckind, color, cpu_level, stocks, and x4 rather than hiding behavior behind a broad memcpy.
Matched fn_8017E21C as a simple counted for-loop over 12 entries setting a signed halfword field to -1, supported by a local two-s16 struct for lbl_804706D8.
Converted gmClassic_801B2D54 to take gm_803DDEC8Struct* in the header, allowing the call gmClassic_801B2D54(&gmClassic_803DDEC8) to express data type and address ownership.
Updated the symbol map after renaming gmClassic_801B3E44, which was specifically called out as necessary for objdiff awareness.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: You need to update this in `symbols.txt` or else objdiff won't be aware of the function.
review_feedback.lesson: Renamed or newly matched functions must be reflected in config/GALE01/symbols.txt.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: Approved after the requested symbols.txt issue was addressed; no detailed approval body was present in the slice.

follow_up_queries: Check later gmClassic PRs for semantic names replacing gmClassic_801B2BA4, gmClassic_801B2D54, gmClassic_801B3500, gmClassic_801B3A34, and gmClassic_801B3B40.
Look for later refinements of gm_803DDEC8Struct fields and the purpose of gmClassic_803DDEC8.
Investigate why configure.py needed MSL/math_data.c as NonMatching in this PR, since the provided slice does not explain it.
Search for further cleanup of shared Classic scene data externs in Adventure and All-Star mode files.
Find whether lbl_804706D8_t received a more semantic name after fn_8017E21C was matched.
